headline: Relief that feels steady and sustainable
quote: I came in with chronic neck and shoulder pain and felt real relief after a few sessions. Dr. Dan is thoughtful, gentle, and explains every step.
name: Pain recovery patient

headline: Sleep improved without feeling rushed through care
quote: Acupuncture helped my stress and sleep more than I expected. I now sleep through the night and feel more balanced during the day.
name: Wellness patient

headline: Mobile visits made consistency much easier
quote: Mobile visits made care easy for my schedule. The virtual consult was clear, the treatment plan was practical, and my sinus congestion improved.
name: Busy working parent

headline: A calmer baseline after a few weeks
quote: I started weekly sessions for insomnia and anxiety. After a few weeks I felt calmer, slept better, and had steadier daytime energy.
name: Anxiety support patient

headline: Supportive fertility care with clear guidance
quote: We added acupuncture during our fertility journey and appreciated the thoughtful guidance. The process felt supportive and personalized.
name: Fertility support patient
